suggestions.action: Implement data imputation for null values
suggestions.rationale: Imputing with mean or median values can effectively reduce the null rate and maintain the overall distribution of loan amounts.

suggestions.action: Flag and investigate the source of null values
suggestions.rationale: Identifying the root cause of the null spikes can help prevent future occurrences and improve data collection processes.

suggestions.action: Impute missing values using the mean or median of available data
suggestions.rationale: This approach fills nulls with a calculated representative value, reducing the null rate effectively.

suggestions.action: Flag records with null values for review or data correction
suggestions.rationale: This allows for manual investigation and correction, ensuring data integrity.
Eliminating the outlier will improve the statistical integrity of the interest rate data.
Capping the outlier will retain more data while ensuring values stay within a valid range.

detail: Mixed formats: 7 rows as YYYY-MM-DD, 3 rows as MM/DD/YYYY

suggestions.action: Convert all dates to YYYY-MM-DD format
suggestions.rationale: This approach standardizes the date format, ensuring consistency across all records.

suggestions.action: Convert all dates to MM/DD/YYYY format
suggestions.rationale: This option may accommodate users familiar with the MM/DD/YYYY format, but introduces a risk of confusion if not all data sources align.
